name: neostack-connect
description: Connect Claude Code to a running NeoStackAI Unreal editor session.

project_dir.title: Unreal project directory
project_dir.description: Path to the folder that contains your .uproject file. The proxy reads <project>/Saved/NeoStackAI/runtime.json to find the running editor. Without this set, discovery falls back to walking up from the current working directory to find a .uproject — which only works if you launch your client from inside the project dir.
